events.description:
Annual Holiday Celebration hosted by TechCorp HR.
Date: Friday, December 18, 2026
Time: 6:00 PM – 10:00 PM
Location: Grand Ballroom, The Ritz-Carlton, 181 Fremont Street, San Francisco, CA 94105
Dress Code: Cocktail attire
Plus ones welcome
Evening includes: cocktail hour with passed appetizers, plated dinner (vegetarian options), live band and dancing, year-end awards ceremony.
RSVP: Please RSVP by December 4, 2026 using the provided link (RSVP deadline noted).
